subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! According to what is evident, thou art rising and shining forth like unto the stars from the dawning-place of humility and submissiveness, and in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق از قرار معلوم مانند نجوم از مطلع خضوع و خشوع طالع و لائحی و در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
